name: Lookup
description: Find values in a target column using a lookup table and either append fields or replace matched text.

fields.name: matchLocation
fields.title: Match
fields.description: How to match the lookup find value against the target text.

fields.name: targetCol
fields.title: Find Within Field
fields.description: Column in the input dataframe to search/modify.

fields.name: lookupFindCol
fields.title: Find Value
fields.description: Column in the lookup table that contains the find values.

fields.name: actionType
fields.title: Action
fields.description: Choose Append to add lookup columns, or Replace to change matched text in the target column.

fields.name: lookupReplaceCol
fields.title: Lookup Replace Column
fields.description: When Action is Replace: column in lookup table that contains the replacement text.

fields.name: appendCols
fields.title: Append Columns
fields.description: When Action is Append: which columns from the lookup table to append to the input rows.

fields.name: replaceMultipleItems
fields.title: Replace Multiple Items
fields.description: When replacing, replace all matches rather than only the first.
